findings.evidence: `rg -n "measure_eq_of_forall_univ_pi" code/TauCeti` shows the only use is line 69 inside `conditionallyIIDWith_of_forall_rectangles`.
findings.fix: Make this theorem `private`, or move a deliberately public version to the measure-theory product API with an appropriate namespace/name if downstream users are meant to depend on it.
findings.issue: `measure_eq_of_forall_univ_pi` is a public, generic measure-extensionality helper in the de Finetti API even though only the bridge proof consumes it.

findings.fix: Add a wrapper characterization, e.g. `conditionallyIID_iff_exists_forall_rectangles`, derived from `conditionallyIID_iff` and `conditionallyIIDWith_iff_forall_rectangles`, so users can use the existential API without unfolding and recombining lemmas manually.
findings.issue: The public rectangle characterization only covers `ConditionallyIIDWith`; the existential wrapper `ConditionallyIID` has the intro theorem at line 103 but no `ConditionallyIID μ X ↔ ∃ ν, Measurable ν ∧ ...` rectangle form.

summary: The rectangle bridge exposes one implementation lemma too broadly and leaves the existential wrapper without its own rectangle characterization API.
